trivia_bullets.text: Blossoming Sands is part of the Khans of Tarkir gain-land cycle, first printed September 2014. The Aetherdrift printing is its 17th appearance.

"The Alacrian Quickbeasts desire not only to win, but to forge new alliances against the unknown threats of this interconnected Multiverse." The Alacrian Quickbeasts are rider-and-steed pairs from Alacria; Quickbeasts are intelligent, aether-fueled winged creatures — the silhouetted flyer in the art is likely one of them.
Artist Valera Lutfullina gives the gain land a landscape-only treatment foregrounding the desert ecology of the Avishkar leg of the race rather than any faction's mechanics.

related_cards.note: same gain-land cycle, green-blue pair; same set
